description: Legal document. In Arabic script, in a relatively difficult hand. An iqrāq document: "aqarr al-Muslim hujjatuhu min Abī Bakr". Includes signatures and dates: Ramaḍān x62 H, the year is not extremely clear. On verso. there is a single line of text, mentioning Zakariyyā. Needs examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי. בכתב ערבי, בכתיבה קשה יחסית. מסמך אִקְרַאר.
